untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires multi-bar shape recognition (two distinct bottoms, rounded vs spike morphology, 2-6 week separation, inter-bottom rise of 10%+, and volume comparison across two separate formations). Current indicator set lacks temporal pattern matching, multi-bottom detection, and inter-valley peak identification needed to fully characterize Adam and Eve Bottom. Approximated with double-bottom reversal signals using price position and breakout logic, but true pattern topology cannot be validated.
